name: @nw/server
description: Notebook Wars server: metaserver(REST) + gateway(control-plane WS) + matchsvc(private matchmaking brain) + gameserver(data-plane WS) + commercial(wallet/transactions) + worldsvc(SLG overworld) + admin(ops backend) + shared + contracts

scripts.dev:health: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "& { $checks = [ordered]@{ meta='http://127.0.0.1:18080/health'; gateway='http://127.0.0.1:8090/health'; matchsvc='http://127.0.0.1:8091/health'; game='http://127.0.0.1:8081/health'; commercial='http://127.0.0.1:18082/health'; world='http://127.0.0.1:18084/health'; admin='http://127.0.0.1:18083/health'; analytics='http://127.0.0.1:18085/health' }; foreach ($s in $checks.Keys) { $ok=$false; try { $r=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $checks[$s] -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3 -EA Stop; $ok=($r.StatusCode -eq 200) } catch {}; if ($ok) { Write-Host ('  OK   '+$s) -FG Green } else { Write-Host ('  DOWN '+$s+' -> '+$checks[$s]) -FG Red } } }"
